title: Qlog Core Model And Contained JSON Writer Work Item
summary: Implement the contained qlog core model, file envelope, trace and event contracts, common fields, and a writer boundary that can emit contained JSON without forcing the sequential envelope into v1.
planned_changes: Introduce core types for qlog files, traces, events, common fields, schema URIs, and extension-preserving event payloads. Keep the writer boundary serialization-neutral enough that future sequential output can be added without reshaping the domain model, and expose the contained serializer string and Stream entry points without adding sequential JSON Text Sequences behavior in this slice.
out_of_scope: Sequential JSON Text Sequences output in v1.
verification_plan: Run focused unit tests for the envelope and model contracts, contract or snapshot tests for contained JSON shapes, string and Stream serializer parity checks, and the repo-local SpecTrace validator before widening to QUIC adapters.
